description: Specific type of CNEC that monitors phase angle shift between two ends of a branch

id.description: The unique identifier of the CNEC

exportingNetworkElementId.description: The identifier of the network element of the exporting end of the branch

importingNetworkElementId.description: The identifier of the network element of the importing end of the branch

border.description: The border to which the CNEC belongs

instant.description: The identifier of the instant of the CNEC

contingencyId.description: The identifier of the contingency of the CNEC

optimized.description: Indicates whether the CNEC is optimized

monitored.description: Indicates whether the CNEC is monitored

reliabilityMargin.description: The reliability margin of the CNEC

thresholds.description: The list of thresholds of the CNEC, if several are defined the RAO will only consider their intersection
